minimum_image_evidence: Close-up showing dent or scratch with surrounding body panel context
Clear image of windshield or glass with shatter pattern visible
Screen image showing crack pattern; lid open if possible
Close-up of laptop body damage with corner or lid visible
Image showing torn outer packaging and seal area
Multiple angles showing crushed box corners and contents if opened
Stains or warping on box; label and contents if wet
At least one clear close-up where damage is readable
